hero.title: Hungry? We've got you covered.
hero.subtitle: Order from the best restaurants in Switzerland

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Order your favourite food in 3 simple steps
howItWorks.step1Description: Browse hundreds of restaurants in your area and filter by cuisine, rating or delivery time
howItWorks.step2Description: Pick your favourite dishes from the menu and customise your order to your liking
howItWorks.step3Description: Your food is prepared fresh and delivered straight to your door in no time

appPromotion.title: Order on the go
appPromotion.subtitle: Download the just-eat.ch app and order food from anywhere, anytime.

partnerCta.title: List your restaurant
partnerCta.subtitle: Reach thousands of hungry customers in your area. Join our growing network of restaurant partners.

courierCta.title: Deliver with us
courierCta.subtitle: Earn money on your own schedule. Join our fleet of independent couriers across Switzerland.
